titleStmt.title: SII 39.84: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 84. (A.R. No. 84 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL AND SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE. (MĀṞAVARMAN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA I,).

summary.p: It records the gift of land for the offerings to the shrine of Āḷuḍaiya-nāchchiyār of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam, built in the temple of Śivadharmīśvaramuḍaiyār by a native of Rājavallapuram in Kīḻvēmbanāḍu. Mentions the seat called Māḷḷavarāyaṉ [in the king's palace at] Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ Madurai in Madurōdayavaḷanāḍu and the king's brother-inlaw Aḻgapperumāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hariḥ Om svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvi
maruvi teyañ cimayintaiyu nalañciṟappa
ruñcilai nārnta poṟkiri melvarikkayā
ttiṉitaṉam perurka kalikaṭintu ceṅkol naṭap
muvakait tamiḻum muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nallavakai vetamun
ṟṟu Aṟuvakaic camaiyamum Aḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuvakaippāṭalum
koṅ kali cāṭi māḷava ciṅkaḷa kāciṉa kuccā
makāṉāṉ ṉāruvāḻarai
ḷimaṇimuṭi Intāṉ Āra laṅkatir rāmarāviṟai pālippa
neṟi tikaḻa maṇimuṭi poṉṉi cuḻn ṭupuliyāṇai poykalakkaṉṉi cūḻa
yumaru vaḻamum parappit taṉceyum munantaiyañ cetta mulakoḷukkik kāvi
ṉinir pāvik kūmu mā māṭaḻ
tantokaimār Aḻitta
ṟṟimai raṉ maṇ kkuk kuṭutta
ruḷiya maṇṭapattuapiṣekamum ceytu pukaḻ virattu nāñ
ṇṭu nirāḻi vaippaṭi muḻutum potu ḻittuk kūrāḻiyuñ ceyya koḷume
tayavvap puliyū tiruvelle pukkaruḷi poṉṉampaḻa poliya Āṭuvāṉ
k kola malara mellayaṉuṅ kuḷiratu muyamāluyaṉiyāmalan cevaṭi vaṇaṅka
la varavi cūḻa poṉṉaṉar patiyil Ottulakanta Uṟaṅkamaḻa Uyar meruvaikkula
ṉac coṇāṭu karṉiḻanta mālai yu tā varuka veṉṟaḻaittu mā
ṉām Oṭi pukuntu peṟṟa putalvake ni pe poraṟu muṉa kāṭṭi Ivaṟa Aricaṉai
ṉiḻanta vemmaiyellāṅ kaiyakala ttāṉota takam paṇṇitta
veḷaikkut tiriyaviṭṭapaṭikke Itu piṭipāṭāka veṉṟum poṅkutu
ṅ kayil koṇṭuṉṟuka tiḻaka muṭi ṉṉakarum paṇṭaḻinta ceṉepati
ṅ viṭṭaruḷi Akaika kattira velpaṭṭu mekat yaṇ
simhāsanattu vaṉaṅku keḻukvār variyiru pukuṭṭuvaṉ muḻaṅku kiḷi
piṟaiyilaṅkuḻai Aruḷivayar cātukkaḷ Iratta Ulakamuḻutuṭai
māṟapaṉmarāṉa tirabhuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ coṉāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrī cu
nāḷ nūṟṟu muppattiraṇṭiṉāl maturotayavaḷanāṭṭumāṭakkuḷakkiḻ
ṭuttu paḷḷipiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu puramalaināṭṭu
ṭaiyār koyil civapirāmmaṇarum
vāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi kiḻve
mpanāṭṭu rācavallapurattu Uṭaiyāṉ
taraiyaṉ Ikkoyiṟ tirukkāmak
koṭṭattu Eḻuntaruḷuvitta
veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum tirukā
paṭikkum kāṉanāṭṭu kumāttakkuṭi
pattāvatu mutal Antarā
yamum viṉiyokamum veṭṭi pāṭṭamum Eppeṟpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭatati
rukkāmakkoṭṭapapura Iṟaiyiliyāy
namakkuccoṉṉamaiyil Ivvāvumai veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum tirunā
ḷ paṭikkum Iṉṉilammiraṇṭu veliyum yākamum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili
cantivikkirakapperum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaiyiliyāy Iruppatākaṭṭu variyi
lār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum namōlaiyum tara māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivanta
ṅkaḷ cella paṇṇukaveṉṟum Ippaṭi cemapilum veṭṭuvi
ttuk koḷka veṉṟum tiruvāymoḻinataruḷiṉār ruṭaiyāṉ coraṉniṉṟāṭuvā
ṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
yāṇṭu 10 ttāvatu mutal Antarāyam viṉiyokam Uṭpaṭattiru
kkāmak koṭṭappuram Iṟaiyili Ippaṭikku kiḻvempanāṭṭu Irācavallapurattu Uṭaiyāṉ
tamiḻappallavataraiyar puramalai nāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi śivadhammiśvaramuṭaiyār koyil tirukkāmakakoṭṭattu Eḻuntaruḷuvitta
Āḷuṭaiyanācciyārkku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukkum pattāvatu mutal Antarāyamum veṭṭipāṭṭamu
m viṉiyokamum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivikkirakapperum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭattirukāmak
koṭṭapapuram Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟuppatāka kāṉanāṭṭuk mārakkuṭiyile Iruvar kaṭamai veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantivi
kkirakapperu maṟṟu mepperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭattirukāmak koṭṭapapuṟam Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟuppatāka Iṭṭamai
kku Ivaipuravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam miḻalaikkūṟṟattu taccaneṉmali Uṭaiyāṉ
Digital edition of SII 39.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
